'''ngazhofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zzxjoanw|zzxjoanw]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-zh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zzxjoanw|zzxjoanw]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngazhofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæzhefeth|ngæzhefeth]] || [[word:ngæzhefej|ngæzhefej]] || [[word:ngæzhefesh|ngæzhefesh]] || [[word:ngæzhefe|ngæzhefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngazhozhofoth|ngazhozhofoth]] || [[word:ngazhozhofoj|ngazhozhofoj]] || [[word:ngazhozhofosh|ngazhozhofosh]] || [[word:ngazhozhofo|ngazhozhofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngazhofoth|ngazhofoth]] || [[word:ngazhofoj|ngazhofoj]] || [[word:ngazhofosh|ngazhofosh]] || [[word:ngazhofo|ngazhofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngazhoffoth|ngazhoffoth]] || [[word:ngazhoffoj|ngazhoffoj]] || [[word:ngazhoffosh|ngazhoffosh]] || [[word:ngazhoffof|ngazhoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngazhofotho|ngazhofotho]] || [[word:ngazhofojo|ngazhofojo]] || [[word:ngazhofosho|ngazhofosho]] || [[word:ngazhofoko|ngazhofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngazhofoth|ngazhofoth]] || [[word:ngazhofoj|ngazhofoj]] || [[word:ngazhofosh|ngazhofosh]] || [[word:ngazhofo|ngazhofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngazhofothol|ngazhofothol]] || [[word:ngazhofojol|ngazhofojol]] || [[word:ngazhofoshol|ngazhofoshol]] || [[word:ngazhofokol|ngazhofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngazhofothotho|ngazhofothotho]] || [[word:ngazhofojojo|ngazhofojojo]] || [[word:ngazhofoshosho|ngazhofoshosho]] || [[word:ngazhofoko|ngazhofoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngazhofothon|ngazhofothon]] || [[word:ngazhofojon|ngazhofojon]] || [[word:ngazhofoshon|ngazhofoshon]] || [[word:ngazhofokon|ngazhofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngazhofothoro|ngazhofothoro]] || [[word:ngazhofojoro|ngazhofojoro]] || [[word:ngazhofoshoro|ngazhofoshoro]] || [[word:ngazhofokoro|ngazhofokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
